arts.ttl: How long can Dortmund keep their new gem Gittens?
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund have had a mixed season so far, with lots of ups and downs, lately at least, with a positive trend and a couple of good performances. One of Dortmund's glimmers of hope and one of the best youngsters of the season so far has been winger Jamie Gittens. Therefore, it’s not a big surprise that some clubs outside the Premier League have already started talking with Gittens’ management.

arts.ttl: Preview: Borussia Monchengladbach vs. Borussia Dortmund - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Bundesliga clash between Borussia Monchengladbach and Borussia Dortmund, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Ex-West Ham and Borussia Dortmund striker admits La Liga struggles – “My profile doesn’t necessarily fit”
arts.sum: Leganes’ acquisition of Sebastien Haller was hailed as a top signing during the summer, although expectations have not been met so far. The on-loan Borussia Dortmund striker has played nine times this season, and he has failed to get off the mark in the scoring department.
